nodes.label: GSAP Hero Entry + Scroll Parallax Script
nodes.norm_label: gsap hero entry + scroll parallax script

nodes.label: Kaif Brand Identity (Levantine soul food, beach bar, Koh Phangan)
nodes.rationale: Kaif is a beachside restaurant on Chaloklum Bay, Koh Phangan. The name is Arabic for pure bliss and being exactly where you are meant to be. The product purpose is to make visitors feel the place before they arrive — success measured by orders, location saves, or brand recall.
nodes.norm_label: kaif brand identity (levantine soul food, beach bar, koh phangan)

nodes.label: Kaif Menu Identity (Breakfast, All Day, Drinks)
nodes.norm_label: kaif menu identity (breakfast, all day, drinks)

nodes.label: Brand Personality: Warm, Elevated, Unhurried
nodes.rationale: Luxury redefined as ease and intention rather than expense or formality. Guest reviews confirm: gorgeous, airy, peaceful, warm, genuinely attentive.

nodes.label: Anti-References (design anti-patterns to avoid)
nodes.rationale: Explicitly avoid: generic tropical cliche (sunset gradients, palm-tree clip art), budget beach shack aesthetic, corporate hospitality (stock photography, sterile white, CTA-heavy templates), Instagram-filter saturation.

nodes.label: Kaif Design Principles (6 principles)
nodes.rationale: 1) Place before product — atmosphere palpable via typography, color, space. 2) Warmth with precision — approachable but never sloppy. 3) Color as character — strategic color splashes with emotional weight. 4) Editorial confidence — headlines assume interest. 5) Unhurried pace — generous spacing, measured motion. 6) Levantine soul — Laffa, shakshuka, hummus present in design language.

nodes.label: Creative North Star: Still Water, Deep Color
nodes.rationale: References: Drift by Noma (atmosphere as product), Four Seasons Surf Club (effortless hospitality), Kinfolk (editorial warmth, generous whitespace, serif confidence). Anti-reference: Instagram-golden-hour resort that mistakes saturation for soul.
nodes.norm_label: creative north star: still water, deep color

nodes.label: Design System Color Palette (4 named roles)
nodes.rationale: Four roles: Warm Ground (dominant surface, bleached linen/parchment, 50-60% of screen), Deep Voice (dark anchor, espresso-brown/near-black, never cool), Color One (warm saturated mid-tone, terracotta/amber, 10-20% max), Color Two (cooler foil, sage/sea-glass/dusty teal, most sparingly). Color Splash Rule: Color One and Color Two never equal weight — one covers 3x area of the other.
nodes.norm_label: design system color palette (4 named roles)

nodes.label: Design System Typography (Cormorant Garamond + Neue Haas Grotesk)
nodes.rationale: Display: Cormorant Garamond 300 weight — confidence without shouting. Body: Neue Haas Grotesk — humanist, warm, never sterile. Together feel like a well-designed menu. Weight Contrast Rule: each level must differ by at least one full weight step or 1.25x scale ratio.
nodes.norm_label: design system typography (cormorant garamond + neue haas grotesk)

nodes.label: Elevation System (Depth-Through-Tone, no decorative shadows)
nodes.rationale: Flat by default. Depth via tonal differences (Warm Ground vs Color One wash) and motion timing (foreground before background on scroll entry). No box-shadow at rest. Shadows only for interactive states (hover cards, focus fields), never decorative.

nodes.label: Design Do's and Don'ts
nodes.rationale: Do: OKLCH color values, tinted neutrals (no pure white/black), varied spacing for rhythm, Cormorant at 300w, ease-out-quart/quint transitions, staggered scroll entrances. Don't: sunset gradients, palm-tree motifs, neon signage, hand-painted fonts, corporate layouts, Instagram saturation, animate layout properties (width/height/top/left), equal Color One and Color Two weight, gradient text, border-left/right accents > 1px.

nodes.label: Taste Skill Pack (multi-style frontend skill pack)
nodes.norm_label: taste skill pack (multi-style frontend skill pack)

nodes.label: Style Selection Map (14 UI styles)
nodes.rationale: Router logic: brutalism, cinematic-product, dark-luxe, dashboards, editorial-premium, gallery-minimal, minimalism, monochrome-modern, premium-bento, quiet-luxury, soft, soft-brutalism, swiss-system, warm-modern. Default stack: React/Next.js.

nodes.label: Quiet Luxury Baseline Config (DESIGN_VARIANCE:4, MOTION:2, DENSITY:3)
nodes.rationale: Status through restraint — quality through spacing, typography, image curation, not logos or ornament. Palette: off-whites, creams, linen, stone, espresso, muted sage, clay. Hero: arrival scene — interior, object, material plate. Motion: soft fades, subtle mask shifts, restrained hover. No gold gradients, marble textures, glossy black stages.
nodes.norm_label: quiet luxury baseline config (design_variance:4, motion:2, density:3)

nodes.label: Minimalism Baseline Config (DESIGN_VARIANCE:3, MOTION:2, DENSITY:3)
nodes.rationale: Deliberate, edited, expensive-feeling — not empty. Whitespace is structure not absence. Palette: paper, bone, chalk, ash, warm gray, off-black, matte mineral neutrals. Motion almost invisible: quiet reveals, subtle hover tightening. No glassmorphism, loud gradients, endless card stacks.
